_comment: In-Zone Gate for Lawn Agent. Deterministic postcode-range filter — no AI, no API calls, $0 to run. Australian postcodes are allocated in contiguous regional blocks, so range matching is a reliable proxy for 'is this address in our target metro area' without needing a full suburb database.

regions.label: Brisbane Metro
regions.notes: Covers Brisbane CBD, inner suburbs, Logan, Ipswich fringe. Excludes outer rural QLD.

regions.label: Gold Coast
regions.notes: Covers Gold Coast LGA from Coomera/Pimpama down to Coolangatta/Tweed border suburbs on the QLD side.

_note_keywordExclude: Filtered upstream in 01-fetch-addresses.js — front-lawn campaigns only make sense for standalone houses, not strata/unit properties.
